items.title: Tesla Cybercab full specs revealed: 3,113 lbs, 219 HP, 48 kWh
items.body: Tesla’s Cybercab EPA certification documents reveal the robotaxi’s full technical specs for the first time — including a 3,113-lb curb weight, a 219 HP motor, and a 48 kWh battery pack. The filing confirms several claims…
